case_title: NIOMI JENKINS VS. AMAZON.COM INTERNATIONAL INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED MAR-06-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM INTERNATIONAL INC.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 4/17/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY JENKINS, NIOMI AS TO DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM INTERNATIONAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCES AT THE CALLING OF THE CASE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF NIOMIJENKINS WAS PRESENT DURING CHECK IN AND WAS SWORN. WHEN THE MATTER WAS CALLED THE PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. WHEN THE MATTER WAS CALLED FOR THE SECOND TIME THE PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
